name: ui-color-palette
description: Design color palettes, audit contrast, generate code, and sync to Figma, Penpot, Sketch, and Framer — powered by the UI Color Palette API

gitlab_url.description: Your GitLab instance URL (e.g. https://gitlab.example.com). Leave empty if not using GitLab.

framer_mcp_url.description: Your Framer MCP URL from https://www.framer.com/marketplace/plugins/mcp/. Leave empty if not using Framer.
